::: top-banner
:::

---
title: "Workshop Materials"
format: html
---

::: {.text-center}
# 📁 Workshop Materials
:::

::: {.callout-note appearance="simple"}
This section contains key documents, presentations, and shared reference materials related to the workshop.
:::

## 📄 Documents

- 📎 [Workshop Agenda (PDF)](workshop-agenda.pdf)
- 📎 <a href="https://example.com" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">Save the Blue Five Project Summary (PDF)</a>
- 📎 <a href="https://example.com" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">Workshop Overview Presentation (PDF)</a>

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## 🧰 Technical Resources

- 🔗 <a href="https://github.com/IsaakBM/cesmle-ocn-fetch" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">CESM Large Ensemble ocean downscaling workflow</a>
  Workflow and notes related to ocean-variable extraction, climate-model handling, and downscaling-oriented preparation relevant to the workshop's physical modeling discussions.

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## 🎤 Presentations

- 🎞 <a href="https://example.com" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">Isaac Brito-Morales - Project progress and integration overview</a>
- 🎞 <a href="https://example.com" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">Lee Hannah / Sarayu Ramnath - Climate change vulnerability assessment</a>
- 🎞 <a href="https://example.com" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">Mario Pardo / Ariadna Juarez - Dolphins</a>
- 🎞 <a href="https://example.com" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">Yulia Egorova - Mesopelagic systems</a>
- 🎞 <a href="https://example.com" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">Boris DeWitt - Physical modeling and regional context</a>
- 🎞 <a href="https://example.com" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">Shaleyla Kelez - Sea turtles</a>
- 🎞 <a href="https://example.com" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">Gabriel Vianna - Sharks and rays</a>
- 🎞 <a href="https://example.com" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">Frank Garita - Marine mammals</a>

------------------------------------------------------------------------

### 📥 Looking for something?

Participants may continue to share presentations and documents for inclusion in this section. To add more files, please contact **[Isaac Brito-Morales](mailto:ibrito@conservation.org)**.
